sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52069" key="kakanqe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκ-ανθέω</orth>, <sense id="n52069.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bear such blossom</tr_>, Sch. ad loc.</sense> </entryFree>
